hero.mainTitle: Automation That Thinks, Learns & Works Like a Human
hero.description: Turn complex workflows into simple, intelligent automations — in hours, not weeks.

demo.description: MIRYA is your all-in-one automation platform that connects and controls any system, any app, any process with zero code. MIRYA doesn't just follow instructions — it understands data, identifies patterns, and makes smart decisions in real time. It performs every task just like a human - only faster, more precise and completely reliable.

howToUse.description: Effortless automation starts with MIRYA — no coding, no configuration, no waiting. Just drag & drop your ideas, record your workflow, or speak your commands as your digital teammate learns and acts.

slides.title: Record Your Workflow
slides.description: Complete your task just as you normally would, and MIRYA watches how you work clicks, keystrokes, decisions, and all.

slides.title: Understands the Logic
slides.description: MIRYA observes the critical decision patterns, understands the steps it sees, and automatically builds a smart logic flow under the hood.

slides.title: Run it Automatically
slides.description: Now MIRYA performs the task for you across any system, app, browser, or environment with the same intelligence and adaptability as a human.

slides.title: Improve & Scale
slides.description: Customize, repeat, or expand your automation across entire teams or departments. Zero code. Zero complexity. Maximum impact.

workflow.mainTitle: Build flows visually. No learning curve. No complexity
workflow.description: Drag, drop, and connect steps like messages, conditions, actions, and checks — all powered by an AI assistant that helps you build faster.

mainHeading: Powerful Features That Make Automation Effortless
subHeading: Discover how MIRYA thinks, learns, and executes like a human — without code, complexity, or integrations.

cards.title: Secure, Scalable & Fully Yours
cards.description: Run MIRYA completely on-premise for total data privacy and control. Scale automation across teams, and customise the entire platform with your own branding—without hidden costs or limitations.

cards.title: Universal Compatibility
cards.description: MIRYA works on top of any app or system exactly like a human—clicking, typing, and navigating visually. No APIs, no interfaces, no tool changes. Your existing software stays the same; MIRYA automates everything.

cards.title: Human-Level Intelligence & Zero-Code Learning
cards.description: MIRYA learns tasks by simply watching you work. It understands screens, interprets data, and builds smart automations without writing a single line of code. Just record once, and MIRYA handles the rest with human-like precision.

footer.text2: MIRYA connects and controls any system, any app, any process — with zero code. Built for business users. Powered by Cognitive AI.

buildForYou.mainTitle: What We Have Built For You
buildForYou.description: Harnessing the power of artificial intelligence to revolutionise industries and enhance human experiences.

slides.title: Planning Feature
slides.description: Create structured plans, break tasks into milestones, and visualize timelines with automated suggestions powered by intelligent workflow analysis.

slides.title: Real Time Data Tracking
slides.description: Monitor live progress, detect bottlenecks instantly, and sync data across teams with second-by-second updates for accurate decision making.

slides.title: Gain Automation Insights
slides.description: Identify repetitive tasks, optimize team efficiency, and receive AI-driven recommendations to automate workflows effortlessly.

aiAssistantSection.description: MIRYA comes with a built-in conversational AI assistant that understands your workflows, interprets context, and performs actions just like a highly skilled automation expert — instantly, accurately, and hands-free.

features.title: Create & Edit Workflows Instantly
features.description: Ask, and MIRYA builds or updates workflows on the fly — no clicks, no configuration screens.

features.title: Modify Node Parameters
features.description: Adjust any step with a simple command. The assistant updates logic or triggers instantly.

features.title: Control Executions
features.description: Start, stop, pause, or resume any process with a single command — all in real time.

features.title: Context Aware Understanding
features.description: Get answers like “Is process X running?” or “Did step Y finish?” with full system awareness.

features.title: Autonomous Navigation
features.description: The assistant switches between windows or processes automatically to complete tasks.

features.title: Built-In File Intelligence
features.description: Search inside files and get direct summaries — instantly and in natural language.

testimonialsSection.mainTitle: Reviews From Customers Who Use MIRYA
testimonialsSection.description: Harnessing the power of artificial intelligence to revolutionize industries and enhance human experiences.

items.text: The easiest automation tool we’ve ever used. Our team learned it in one day. A tool that works exactly with the systems we already have no integrations needed. We white-labeled MIRYA and now deliver automation to our clients under our brand. Game-changing.
items.author: David Anderson

cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.description: We use cookies to personalise content, ads and to analyse our traffic. We also share information about your use of our site with our advertising and analytics partners who may combine it with other information that you've provided to them or that they've collected from your use of their services.
